prompts.title: A 1:1 square format photograph presented
prompts.content: A 1:1 square format photograph presented within a uniform, thin solid white border (approx. 3px relative width) framing all four sides of the entire composition. Containing within this white frame is a colossal, overstuffed sculpture of the [image 1], brutally deformed and sadistically crammed into the confining square space. The figure is constructed from clean, high gloss nylon padding big head segments, The obejct is heavy a swollen shape, pressing intensely against the inner edges of the white border, with facial features smushed and limbs awkwardly crushed to fit, emphasizing a painful sense of extreme pressurized distortion. Do not overly crush, smear, or distort the eyes, nose, or mouth. Keep the facial features readable, balanced, and appealing, with the expression still intact. The form is bursting at the seams like an overinflated balloon, completely eliminating any negative space or background within the frame. Soft, dramatic lighting grazes the sleek, premium nylon surfaces, highlighting the deep, exaggerated bulbous folds, immense pillowy textures, and the surreal, overwhelming tension of the trapped character.

prompts.title: 아이스 블록 제품 사진 프롬프트
prompts.content: ate a product photography image only. Use the uploaded product as the exact product reference. Position the uploaded product accurately and fully inside a thick translucent ice block, preserving its exact logo, packaging shape, proportions, and visible front-facing identity. Adapt the ice block’s overall shape and contours to naturally fit the product’s form and silhouette, so the ice appears custom-frozen around the product while still remaining thick, sculptural, and premium. Use a vertical close-up front view composition. Keep the product and ice block slightly tilted 15 degrees as one unified floating object, with clear top, bottom, left, and right margins, centered in the frame. The logo should remain visible through frosty distortion, trapped air bubbles, and bright frozen texture. Remove all shadows completely. Use a #091E3A to #2F80ED to #2D9EE0 vertical gradient studio background with cold crisp lighting, icy rim highlights, and a clean futuristic beauty campaign finish. Make the image feel cold, fresh, sculptural, and premium. Do not add extra text.
